sentences.english: Describe a historical figure you admire.
Explain why this person is important to you.
The historical figure I admire most is King Sejong the Great of Korea.
sentences.korean: 가장 존경하는 역사적 인물은 한국의 세종대왕이에요.

sentences.english: He created Hangul the Korean alphabet specifically to give ordinary people the ability to read and write.
sentences.korean: 한국어 문자인 한글을 만들었는데 특히 일반인에게 읽고 쓰는 능력을 주기 위해서였어요.

sentences.english: Before Hangul only the wealthy elite could read because Chinese characters were extremely difficult to learn.
sentences.korean: 한글 이전에는 한자가 배우기 매우 어려워서 부유한 엘리트만 읽을 수 있었어요.

sentences.english: What makes him truly remarkable is that he put the needs of common people above everything else.
sentences.korean: 그를 진정으로 놀랍게 만드는 것은 일반 백성의 필요를 다른 모든 것 위에 둔 거예요.

sentences.english: His invention of Hangul is considered one of the most significant contributions to human literacy in history.
sentences.korean: 한글 발명은 역사상 인류 문해력에 대한 가장 중요한 기여 중 하나로 여겨져요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
